entity.summary: Cronos weighted-pool automated-market-maker decentralized exchange associated with the DarkNess Finance ecosystem, with current liquidity and active recent swap volume.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies Darkness as a Cronos weighted-pool AMM DEX and reports current TVL together with non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume. A stable first-party website URL was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: DarkNess Finance project social profile
evidence.notes: Project social identity linked from the current protocol registry and used for identity corroboration rather than as the sole status source.

evidence.title: Darkness metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Registry identifies Darkness as a Cronos weighted-pool AMM DEX and reports current TVL plus non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: Darkness DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Darkness as a Cronos decentralized exchange.
